vocab.meaning: một hình thức thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: For me, diving into a fantasy novel is a form of escapism that allows me to forget my daily worries.

vocab.meaning: mày mò, sửa chữa vặt hoặc thử nghiệm cái gì đó
vocab.example: I love to tinker with old electronic gadgets in my garage to see if I can bring them back to life.

vocab.meaning: nơi giải tỏa/phát huy khả năng sáng tạo
vocab.example: Pottery provides me with a much-needed creative outlet away from the rigid structure of my corporate office.

vocab.meaning: giúp tôi luôn nhạy bén/tập trung/thận trọng
vocab.example: Strategy games really keep me on my toes because I have to constantly anticipate my opponent's next move.

vocab.meaning: chỉ đơn thuần vì lợi ích/mục đích của cái gì
vocab.example: I play the guitar purely for the sake of personal enjoyment, with no intention of performing professionally.
I stumbled upon the art of calligraphy during a summer trip, and it has been my main hobby ever since.

vocab.meaning: đường cong học tập dốc (có nhiều khó khăn lúc mới bắt đầu)
vocab.example: Learning to edit videos had a steep learning curve, but the final results are incredibly rewarding.

vocab.meaning: mải mê/đắm chìm vào cái gì
vocab.example: I can be so engrossed in my gardening that I often don't notice the hours passing by.
Spending my weekends oil painting really helps nurture my soul and restore my inner peace.

vocab.meaning: giá trị trị liệu/giải tỏa căng thẳng
vocab.example: I believe that simple hobbies like knitting have immense therapeutic value for mental health.
